name: Hlomla Magopeni
title: Full-Stack Developer
bio: Tech enthusiast crafting digital bridges between communities and opportunities through innovative full-stack solutions and problem-solving excellence.
aboutBio:
I'm Hlomla Magopeni, a 3rd-year Application Development student at the Cape Peninsula University of Technology. I'm passionate about building full-stack applications that solve real problems—whether it's connecting unserved communities, streamlining healthcare access, or creating tools that empower students.

I especially enjoy identifying problems and designing solutions that simplify life and make technology truly convenient. I thrive on turning complex challenges into clean, maintainable software, collaborating with teams, and creating impactful solutions. For me, technology isn't just code—it's a bridge that makes life easier, connects people, and opens opportunities.
